scripts.backend:deploy: yarn backend:build && yarn workspace @alexandria/functions push-images-processing && yarn infra:apply
scripts.frontend:build: yarn workspace @alexandria/infrastructure output && yarn workspace @alexandria/web-client-v2 build
scripts.frontend:sync: aws s3 sync packages/web-client-v2/dist s3://$(cd packages/infrastructure && terraform output -raw webclient_bucket) --delete
scripts.frontend:deploy: yarn frontend:build && yarn frontend:sync && yarn workspace @alexandria/infrastructure invalidate-frontend
